title: Batch-wise verification of multiparty computations
abstract: Some embodiments are directed to a computation device configured for batch-wise multiparty verification of a computation which has been performed multiple times. The computations being multiparty computations that are cryptographically shared between the computation device and multiple other computation devices. The computation device is configured to perform the computation a further time to obtain a randomizing computation on a randomizing set of values.
claims:

A computation device as in any one of the preceding Claims, wherein the processor is configured to generate with the multiple other computation devices multiple random numbers (S j ), the computation being performed multiple times to obtain multiple randomizing computations, the variables being polynomial^ interpolated to the multiple random numbers from the shares in the multiple computations and in the multiple randomizing computations. 8.
